verses.text: Keimah in Khrih gamtatzia ka zuih mah bangin note in zong keima gamtatzia hong zui ta un.

sections.sectionTitle: Numeite in Lu A Khuhna Ding Thu

verses.text: Note in kei hong phawk tawntungin ka hong hilh thu khempeuh zui na hih manun ka hong phat mahmah hi
Ahi zongin na theihding uh ka deih thu in: Mi khempeuh' lutang pen Khrih hi a, numei' lutang pen pasal hi a, Khrih' lutang pen Pasian ahihna thu ahi hi
Pasal khatpeuh in mihon biakna sungah a lukhu lakhia lopi-in thungen ahi a, Pasian' thugen ahi zongin a om leh Khrih' min a daisak ahi hi

Tua mah bangin mihon biakna sungah numei khatpeuh in a lu khuh lopi-in thungen ahi a, Pasian' thugen ahi zongin a om leh a pasal' min a daisak hi a, a lu a met numei mah tawh a kilamdan'na a omlo ahi hi
Numeite in a lu a khuh kei ding uh leh a sam uh met vet uh hen. Tua ahih manin numeite in a sam uh a metding a zumhuai mahmah khat ahih mah bangin a lu uh khuh ta uh hen
Pasalte pen Pasian' lim leh a minthan'na a kilangsak ahih manin a lu uh a khuhding uh kilawmlo hi. Ahi zongin numeite pen pasalte' minthan'na a kilangsak ahi hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh numei tung panin pasal kipiangsak lo a, pasal tung panin numei kipiangsak zaw hi
Numei hangin pasal a kipiangsak hilo a, pasal hangin numei a kipiangsak hizaw hi
Tua ahih ciangin a pasalte uh ukna nuai-ah a om ahihna a lahna dingun vantung mite' muhna-ah numeite in a lu uh a khuhding uh kilawm hi
Ahi zongin Topa thu sunga i nuntakna-ah numeite pen pasal tawh loin a tangdin'zo hilo a, pasalte zong numei tawh koploin a tangdin'zo hi tuanlo hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh numei pen pasal tung panin a kipiangsak hi a, pasal pen numei sung panin a suak ahi hi. Tua hi a, na khempeuh, Pasian kiang panin a hong pai ahi hi
Hih thu nomau mah in ngaihsun tawm un. Numeite in a lu uh khuh lopi-in mihon biakna lakah Pasian kiangah thu a ngetding uh kilawm ahi hiam
I pian'pih ngeina mahmahah zong pasalte in sam sau a khawi pen amau-a' dingin a zumhuai thu ahihna
leh numeite in sam sau a neih pen a minthan'na uh ahihna thu hong kilangsak hilo ahi hiam? Numeite' sam sau pen a lu uh a tuamna dingin a kipia ahi hi
Hih thu a nialnuam a omkhak zenzen leh eite-a kipan Pasian pawlpi mi a kuamah peuh in tu-a ka hong gen ngeina lobuang adang a thei omlo hi, ci-in gen ding lobuang bangmah dang omlo hi.
Ahi zongin a nuai-a thu tawh kisai-in note ka hong pakta kei hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh pawlpi kikhopna na neih uh ciangin phatna sangin siatna na piangsakzaw uh hi
A masa penin, pawlpi na kikhop uh ciangin note lakah pawl kikhenna om hi, ci-in ka za hi. Hih ka zak thu a manna omkha dingin ka um hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh kuateng pawlpi mi citak ahi hiam, ci-in a kilatna dingin kikhenna a ommah ding ahi hi
Nekkhawmna a bawl dingin note na kikhop uh ciangin Topa' Nekkhawmna a ne dingin na pai kei uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh nekkhawmna ne dingin na pai uh ciangin pawlkhatte amau' an tawh na tung masa-in ne pah uh ahih manin, pawlkhatte a kham mahmahin na om uh hangin pawlkhatte gilkialin a om uh hi

Hih bangin na gamtat uh, anletui na nekna ding uh inn neilo na hi uh hiam? Tua ahih kei leh Pasian' pawlpi simmawh bawlin pawlpi mizawngte na maizumsak nopna uh ahi hiam? Hih thu tawh kisai-ah hong pakta ding nong sak uh leh note ka hong pakta het kei hi.
Bang hang hiam cih leh note kiangah ka hong gen thu pen Topa kiang panin ka ngah thu hi a, tua thu in: Topa Jesuh a kilehhek ding nitakin anlum la-in
Pasian tungah lungdamna a kohkhit ciangin balnen a, “Hih pen note-a' dingin a hong kipia keima pumpi ahi hi. Kei na hong phawkna dingun na ne un,” ci hi

Tua mah bangin nitak an a nekkhit uh ciangin hai la a, “Hih hai sunga om leenggahzu pen keima sisan tawh a kikipsak Pasian' thuciamna thak ahi hi. Hih bangin na dawn simun, kei na hong phawkna dingun na dawn un,” ci hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh hih bangin anlum ne-in hai sung panin leenggahzu na dawn simun, Topa a hong paikik matengin ama sihna thu a gengen na hi uh hi.
Tua ahih manin a kilawm lopi-in Topa' anlum ne-in, a hai panin leenggahzu a dawn mi peuhmah pen Topa' pumpi leh a sisan a mindaisak hi-in a mawh ahi uh hi
Tua ahih manin a kuamah peuh ki-entel masa phot uh hen la, tua khit ciangin Topa' anlum ne-in a hai panin leenggahzu dawn pan ta hen
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa' pumpi a khiatna theilopi-in anlum ne-in hai panin leenggahzu a dawn mi pen amahmah mawhsak thukhenna a kipiatawm ahi hi
Tua bang mawhna hangin note tampi tak cina-in na zawngkhal uh a, pawlkhat zong na si uh hi
Eite hoihtakin ki-entel masa peuh lehang Pasian' mawhsak thukhenna i thuak kei ding hi
Ahi zongin eite in hih leitung mite tawh mawhsakna i thuakkhawm lohna dingin Topa in eite hong thuhilhin gim hong pia hi
Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw, nekkhawm ne dingin na kikhop uh ciangin kingakkim dimdiam un
Tua bangin na kikhop uh ciangin Pasian' thukhenna na thuakkhak lohna dingun a gilkial na om uh leh zong na inn uhah an ne masa un. Thu dangdangte ahih leh ka hong pai ciangin ka hong gen ding hi.
